PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?attendance WHERE {
  VALUES ?team {
    wd:Q213959 wd:Q207841
  }
  .
  ?game wdt:P710 ?team ; wdt:P1110 ?attendance ; wdt:P580 ?date ; wdt:P31 wd:Q13406554 .
  FILTER(?date >= "2013-10-12" ^^ xsd:date && ?date <= "2013-10-19" ^^ xsd:date)
}
GROUP BY ?attendance
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?team) = 2)
ORDER BY ASC(xsd:integer(?attendance))
LIMIT 3
